---
title: "Page 1 - Data Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec02-sp01"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec02"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---

## Data or visual

_Insert your table, graph, or visualization here._

## What to notice

_Call out specific features, trends, or anomalies the learner should observe._

## Interpretation

_Explain what the data means and how it should be interpreted._

## Why it matters

_Explain the importance of being able to interpret this specific data._

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Data and Media Pages</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp02.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 2 - Video Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
